revision.comment: categorization (via [[WP:JWB]])
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects H]]

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hokkaido here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hokkaido for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Navbox
| name      = Hokkaido
| title     = [[File:Shadow picture of Hokkaido prefecture edit.png|20x20px|Shadow picture of Hokkaido]] [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]]
| state     = {{{state|autocollapse}}}
| above     = [[:en:Sapporo|Sapporo]] <small>([[:en:List of prefectural capitals in Japan|capital]])</small>
| image     = [[File:Flag of Hokkaido Prefecture.svg|60px|Flag of Hokkaido]]
| listclass = hlist

| list1     = {{Ishikari|border=subgroup|title=[[:en:Ishikari Subprefecture|Ishikari Subprefecture]]}}
| list2     = {{Oshima|border=subgroup|title=[[:en:Oshima Subprefecture|Oshima Subprefecture]]}}
| list3     = {{Hiyama|border=subgroup|title=[[Hiyama Subprefecture]]}}
| list4     = {{Shiribeshi|border=subgroup|title=[[:en:Shiribeshi Subprefecture|Shiribeshi Subprefecture]]}}
| list5     = {{Sorachi|border=subgroup|title=[[:en:Sorachi Subprefecture|Sorachi Subprefecture]]}}
| list6     = {{Kamikawa|border=subgroup|title=[[:en:Kamikawa Subprefecture|Kamikawa Subprefecture]]}}
| list7     = {{Rumoi|border=subgroup|title=[[:en:Rumoi Subprefecture|Rumoi Subprefecture]]}}
| list8     = {{Sōya|border=subgroup|title=[[:en:Sōya Subprefecture|Sōya Subprefecture]]}}
| list9     = {{Okhotsk|border=subgroup|title=[[:en:Okhotsk Subprefecture|Okhotsk Subprefecture]]}}
| list10    = {{Iburi|border=subgroup|title=[[:en:Iburi Subprefecture|Iburi Subprefecture]]}}
| list11    = {{Hidaka|border=subgroup|title=[[Hidaka Subprefecture]]}}
| list12    = {{Tokachi|border=subgroup|title=[[:en:Tokachi Subprefecture|Tokachi Subprefecture]]}}
| list13    = {{Kushiro|border=subgroup|title=[[:en:Kushiro Subprefecture|Kushiro Subprefecture]]}}
| list14    = {{Nemuro|border=subgroup|title=[[:en:Nemuro Subprefecture|Nemuro Subprefecture]]}}

| below     = [[:en:List of mergers in Hokkaido|List of mergers in Hokkaido]]
}}<noinclude>
{{Navbox documentation|3=
==See also==
* [[:Category:Hokkaido]]
}}

[[Category:Japan geography navigational boxes]]
[[Category:Island navigational boxes]]

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
